pi_items.source: Task instructions and setup_task.sh output expectations
Task instructions and SUMO default step-length parameter
Task instructions mapping to simulation <time><begin value="0"/></time>
Task instructions mapping to simulation <time><end value="500"/></time>
Code execution: Running SUMO with the Pasubio scenario from t=0 to 500 produced a 28.2 MB FCD file, confirming 100 KB is a valid lower-bound threshold.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the Bologna Pasubio SUMO scenario to generate synthetic Floating Car Data (FCD). The expected output paths for the configuration (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run_fcd.sumocfg), FCD (/home/ga/SUMO_Output/pasubio_fcd.xml), and tripinfo (/home/ga/SUMO_Output/tripinfos.xml) are accurately defined. The requested simulation bounds (0 to 500 seconds) and FCD period (1.0) correspond to standard SUMO XML parameters. Empirical execution of the scenario with these parameters yields a ~28.2 MB FCD file, validating the min_fcd_size_bytes threshold of 100 KB as an appropriate sanity check for successfully executing the simulation run.
